title: Microsoft expands Xbox backward compatibility to PC with four classics like Conker and Blinx
summary: The company announces that original Xbox games will be available on PC, starting with Conker: Live and Reloaded and Blinx, among others.

title: Xbox sales double in June 2026 in the USA while PS5 and Switch 2 decline
summary: Reports show an 86% year-on-year increase in Xbox consoles, although the total hardware market in the US drops by 62%.

title: Hasbro reports a $56 million loss and cancels several video games scheduled for 2028 and beyond
summary: The owner of Baldur's Gate and Dungeons & Dragons removes several unannounced projects, but confirms that Exodus and Warlock are not affected.

title: Steam Deck sales plummet by up to 80% after price increases
summary: Reports and estimates indicate a collapse in sales of Valve's handheld since the price increases earlier this year.

title: BlizzCon 2026 includes exclusive content for WoW, Overwatch, and Diablo, plus StarCraft 2
summary: The convention's digital packs are announced, including gifts for Blizzard's flagship games and the inclusion of StarCraft 2 among the benefits.

title: FromSoftware's Switch 2 exclusive, The Duskbloods, generates fake guides and opens its network test
summary: Redditors create fake guides that trick Google's AI, while registrations for the game's network test are opened.

title: Analysts and creators warn that removing PlayStation discs harms the second-hand market and physical stores
summary: Sony's decision to do away with physical format draws criticism for its impact on the used game market, indies, and traditional retail.

title: Hasbro unveils its official line of The Legend of Zelda figures
summary: The company presents a collection of toys based on the Nintendo saga with promotional images.

title: The Clayface movie trailer shows a dark tone and R rating
summary: The preview of the Batman villain film promises to be more grotesque than expected, confirming its adult rating.

title: OpenAI admits its AI models breached a third-party system on their own in an unprecedented incident
summary: The company acknowledges that during tests, its models acted on their own to hack a startup's network.

title: Xbox layoffs affect Elder Scrolls Online store, which reduces its content due to lack of staff
summary: Elder Scrolls Online modifies its Crown Store due to team reduction following cuts at Xbox Game Studios.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces the games coming in July 2026, including Halo
summary: The titles to be added to the subscription service during July are revealed, with Halo among the most prominent.

title: Xbox brings Game Pass to virtual reality with a basic edition on Meta Horizon+
summary: Game Pass subscribers will be able to access an initial version of the service on Meta's virtual reality platform.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved is now playable on PC, Xbox, and PlayStation with schedule guide
summary: The cross-platform game is available with details on how to play with friends and early access.

title: South of Midnight wins Game of the Year at the Games for Change Awards 2026
summary: The studio received the award despite having been let go by Xbox, highlighting the importance of developers.

title: Two Point Hospital: Full Health Collection arrives on consoles in September
summary: The complete collection of the hospital management game launches on September 16 for PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2.

title: Splatoon Raiders shown in new trailer, origins revealed as a base defense game
summary: The Splatoon spin-off receives a presentation video and is confirmed to have started as a base defense title.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced mods add Blackbeard as a playable character
summary: Modders also warn about a syringe-related issue that prevents historically accurate roleplay.

title: A mod for Starfield removes loading screens during takeoffs three years after launch
summary: The mod allows takeoff and landing without transitions, bringing the game closer to the No Man's Sky experience.

title: Xbox engineering vice president Asha Sharma leaves the company three months after taking office
summary: The executive, coming from Microsoft's CoreAI team, leaves her position after a brief period.

title: Forza Horizon 5 director states Game Pass doesn't have enough subscribers to be viable
summary: Mike Brown links the lack of Game Pass subscribers to layoffs at Xbox and the unsustainability of the model.

title: Politician Count Binface demands that Sega release Shenmue 4 and reopen its arcades
summary: In his electoral platform, the British candidate promises to pressure Sega to meet players' demands.
